{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323042816834DCF1E6BB8F4348B23\"}"},"total":2138},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7579875423076074265","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄难得的精品小说，赌石鉴宝第一名！！！行文流畅，全文几乎没有毒点，很难遇到这样的书，作者文笔不错，还会普及翡翠赌石知识，另付有精美图片[笑] 另一本作品也很好看。期待这本书破百万字，可以慢慢往修仙方面写，金手指再不断提升提升一下[送心][送心][送心][送心]不要烂尾，请继续创作","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"精品小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E7%B2%BE%E5%93%81%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774211296F4348B23%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227579875423076074265%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227446211563557506072%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%B2%BE%E5%93%81%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764831353,"group_id":"7446211563557506072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz2ligfdwCdeutuWWwY4P/8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788850\u0026x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"756939651552640","user_name":"庞贝城的白影人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"756939651552640","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7446211563557506072","book_info":{"abstract":"【缅甸+赌石+空间+爽文+鉴宝+神豪】人在缅国矿区，获得了赌石异能，还自带随身小空间。左手摸一下翡翠，就能知道品质高低。那么，所有的极品翡翠原石都是我的，很合理吧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3a6c9959da16e76544ee168c4d6821eb","author":"醉后通牒","author_id":"","book_id":"7446211563557506072","book_name":"我的左手通天彻地","book_short_name":"我的左手通天彻地","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_co t":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书在写玉石类的小说里算一流的了，专业知识（作者应该是从业者）、故事情节、人物性格描写都比较复合口味，开的挂不算夸张，文字功底很强（至少比我强得多），没有明显毒点。是难得的一部既看得爽又不过于小白的小说，堪称精品，值得一观。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743852055,"group_id":"7446211563557506072","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/MBe2PVq3NnAFk8eCwCAleBqpx+cVsmAFSzJyrDhrDq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789360\u0026x-signature=kF0qy%2FZCs5KDejK6auO%2FMmXI91c%3D","user_id":"2884718957702334","user_name":"三分糊涂"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2884718957702334","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7446211563557506072","book_info":{"abstract":"【缅甸+赌石+空间+爽文+鉴宝+神豪】人在缅国矿区，获得了赌石异能，还自带随身小空间。左手摸一下翡翠，就能知道品质高低。那么，所有的极品翡翠原石都是我的，很合理吧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3a6c9959da16e76544ee168c4d6821eb","author":"醉后通牒","author_id":"","book_id":"7446211563557506072","book_name":"我的左手通天彻地","book_short_name":"我的左手通天彻地","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":262,\"name\":\"都市脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262\u0026name=都市脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":44,\"name\":\"空间\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44\u0026name=空间\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"
